title: Process Engineer Vacancy at RINL South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at RINL South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RINL South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Process Engineer for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RINL South Asia Partners:
RINL South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL South Asia Partners!
